step_rationale: Glucocorticoid stress response; systemic inflammatory modulation post-MI.
mechanism: Corticosterone elevation reflects acute stress and inflammatory regulation during myocardial injury and recovery.

references.title: Impact of myocardial revascularization surgery on the plasma metabolome.
references.journal: Metabolomics : Official journal of the Metabolomic Society

references.title: CYP17A1 deficient XY mice display susceptibility to atherosclerosis, altered lipidomic profile and atypical sex development.
